# json

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: JSON field type: identity only. The config-render capability and the jsonField factory live in the plugins/config sub-plugin.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Fields.Identity` "json"
  - Uses: `fields.Fields`
- Core:
  - Uses: `fields.defineFieldIdentity`, `fields.defineFieldType`
  - Exports: Values: `jsonFieldType`, `jsonIdentity`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `fields/json/config`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`config`** — JSON field type: config-render capability (read-only formatted JSON for config-v2.fields.renderer) plus the jsonField factory.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
